title: Margery Daw
content:
See-saw, Margery Daw
    Sold her bed to lie upon straw;
    Wasn't she a nasty slut
    To sell her bed and lie upon dirt?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "Margery Daw"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
